summary: Iteration 131: PvP Infrastructure UX Revision. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 1) GET /api/infrastructure/types returns pvp_investigative, pvp_operative, pvp_legal with is_pvp=true and correct costs/requirements, 2) PvP types show in Infrastructure board page with 'Bloccato' status (test user is level 0), 3) HQ page shows 3 'Acquista da Infrastrutture' buttons for level 0 divisions, 4) Bottom navbar has 'Sfide' button (data-testid='bottom-nav-sfide') with Target icon that navigates to /hq, 5) Top nav has Challenges button with Swords icon - icons are visually distinct.
critical_code_review_comments: game_systems.py lines 661-711: pvp_investigative, pvp_operative, pvp_legal defined with is_pvp=true and pvp_division fields
infrastructure.py lines 114-171: PvP purchase logic correctly uses 'HQ'/'Strategico' for city/country, activates pvp_divisions on user
HqPage.jsx DivisionCard: Shows 'Acquista da Infrastrutture' button for level 0 divisions with Building icon
InfrastructurePage.jsx: INFRA_CINEPASS includes pvp_investigative: 5, pvp_operative: 3, pvp_legal: 10
App.js line 1049-1051: Bottom nav Sfide button uses Target icon (red when active), navigates to /hq
App.js line 594-597: Top nav Challenges button uses Swords icon - visually distinct from bottom nav
context_for_next_testing_agent: PvP Infrastructure UX Revision fully verified. Key findings: 1) Test user (test@test.com) is at level 0, so all 3 PvP divisions show 'Acquista da Infrastrutture' buttons in HQ page. 2) Infrastructure board shows all 3 PvP types (Divisione Investigativa/Operativa/Legale) with 'Bloccato' status due to level requirements (2/3/5). 3) Bottom nav Sfide button uses Target icon (distinct from top nav Swords icon). 4) PvP infrastructure purchase skips city selection - uses 'HQ'/'Strategico' internally.

infrastructure_types_pvp.returns: pvp_investigative, pvp_operative, pvp_legal with is_pvp=true, pvp_division field, correct costs

icon_distinction.note: Icons are visually distinct as requested

infrastructure_page_pvp_types.shows: Divisione Investigativa, Divisione Operativa, Divisione Legale

pvp_purchase_no_city_selection.behavior: PvP types use 'HQ'/'Strategico' internally, no city selection dialog

frontend_ui_verification.hq_page: Shows QUARTIER GENERALE with 3 division cards at Lv 0, each with 'Acquista da Infrastrutture' button
frontend_ui_verification.infrastructure_page: Shows all 3 PvP types (Divisione Investigativa/Operativa/Legale) with 'Bloccato' badges
frontend_ui_verification.bottom_navbar: Shows Sfide button with Target icon, navigates to /hq
frontend_ui_verification.top_navbar: Shows Challenges button with Swords icon
